description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:latest Docker image and defines a cache for Go module directories (/go/src/github.com, /go/src/golang.org, /go/src/google.golang.org, /go/src/gopkg.in). Add a global before_script that creates /go/src/gitlab.com/cosban and /go/src/_/builds, copies the project into /go/src/gitlab.com/cosban/persistence, and symlinks /go/src/gitlab.com/cosban to /go/src/_/builds/cosban. Define two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a race_detector job that runs `make race` and a unit_tests job that runs `make test`. In the build stage add a build job that runs `make`.
